# scheduler

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Main-thread scheduling primitives (yieldToMain: scheduler.yield → postTask → setTimeout(0)) for cooperative boot/work batching.
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `framework/web-core`
- Web:
  - Exports (values): `yieldToMain`
